title: UPI OC No 220 FY 2025 26 Discontinuing the service of UPI Collect Request for Person to Person (P2P) transactions
text:
ALWAYS
NEE! | oawieo

NATIONAL PAYMENTS CORPORATION OF INDIA

NPCHVUPVOC/220/2025-26 29" July, 2025

To

All UPi Member Banks, PSP’s and Third-Party App Providers

Dear Sir/Madam,
Subject: Discontinuing the service of UPI Collect Request for Person to Person (P2P) transactions

With reference to circular no. NPCI/UPI/2019-20/OC/76 dated 31 October 2019 on Revision in transaction
limits based on merchant & transaction types, NPCI released guidelines on transaction limits for Person to
Person (P2P) Collect. Further it is hereby informed that by 1% October 2025 UPI P2P Collect shall not be
allowed to be processed in UPI.

All member banks, Payment Service Providers (PSPs) and UPI] Apps are hereby directed to implement the
necessary changes in their systems and operational processes to ensure that no P2P Collect transaction is
initiated, routed, or processed on UPI beyond 1 October 2025.

Your sincerely,
SD/-

Kunal Kalawatia
Chief of Products

10014, The Capital, B Wing, 10" Floor,

Bandra Kurla Complex, Bandra (E}, Mumbai 400 051-
